---
title: "Maryam Mozafari"
description: " "
image: /files/headshots/maryam-mozafari.webp
author: "Climate Guest Speakers"
date: "2024-10-15"
categories: [Climate and Career]
#page-layout: full
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 300px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://www.linkedin.com/in/maryam-mozafari #linkedin profile or personal website
      image: /files/headshots/maryam-mozafari.webp
      title: "Maryam Mozafari"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "Program Supervisor, California Public Utilities Commission"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title


### Time

Tuesday, October 15, 2024, 6:00PM - 7:00PM

### Venue 
Online via zoom. Please email for access.

## About



## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio





<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
